mapper.select: SELECT b.*, e.ename FROM board b LEFT JOIN emp e ON b.emp_num = e.emp_num where b.category = '공지'

SELECT DT, nvl(SUM(PLAN_QTY),0) AS PLAN_QTY, nvl(SUM(SHIP_QTY),0) AS SHIP_QTY FROM ( SELECT TO_CHAR(PLAN_START, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS DT, SUM(PLAN_QTY) AS PLAN_QTY, 0 AS SHIP_QTY FROM production_plan WHERE PLAN_STATUS != '취소' GROUP BY TO_CHAR(PLAN_START, 'YYYY-MM-DD') UNION ALL SELECT TO_CHAR(SHIPMENT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS DT, 0 AS PLAN_QTY, SUM(PLAN_QTY) AS SHIP_QTY FROM shipment WHERE SHIPMENT_STATUS = '출하완료' GROUP BY TO_CHAR(SHIPMENT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') ) GROUP BY DT ORDER BY DT

SELECT NVL(sum(current_qty), 0) as current_qty FROM work_order where
created_at between to_date(#{startDate}, 'yyyy-mm-dd') and to_date(#{endDate}, 'yyyy-mm-dd') + 1
trunc(created_at) = trunc(sysdate)
trunc(created_at) >= trunc(sysdate, 'IW') and trunc(created_at) < trunc(sysdate, 'IW') + 7
trunc(created_at) >= trunc(sysdate, 'MM') and trunc(created_at) < add_months(trunc(sysdate, 'MM'), 1)

select sum(plan_qty) as ship_qty from shipment where shipment_status = '출하완료'
and shipment_date between to_date(#{startDate}, 'yyyy-mm-dd') and to_date(#{endDate}, 'yyyy-mm-dd') + 1
and trunc(shipment_date) = trunc(sysdate)
and trunc(shipment_date) >= trunc(sysdate, 'IW') and trunc(shipment_date) < trunc(sysdate, 'IW') + 7
and trunc(shipment_date) >= trunc(sysdate, 'MM') and trunc(shipment_date) < add_months(trunc(sysdate, 'MM'), 1)

SELECT count(*) as defect_qty FROM defective JOIN io ON defective.io_num = io.io_num JOIN emp ON io.emp_num = emp.emp_num JOIN lot ON io.lot_num = lot.lot_num JOIN item ON lot.item_num = item.item_num JOIN qc ON qc.qc_num = io.qc_num where
io_date between to_date(#{startDate}, 'yyyy-mm-dd') and to_date(#{endDate}, 'yyyy-mm-dd') + 1
trunc(io_date) = trunc(sysdate)
trunc(io_date) >= trunc(sysdate, 'IW') and trunc(io_date) < trunc(sysdate, 'IW') + 7
trunc(io_date) >= trunc(sysdate, 'MM') and trunc(io_date) < add_months(trunc(sysdate, 'MM'), 1)
SELECT p.plan_id, p.plan_qty, p.plan_status, i.name, i.unit FROM production_plan p JOIN item i ON p.item_num = i.item_num WHERE ROWNUM <= 5 ORDER BY created_at desc

SELECT w.order_id, w.order_qty, w.current_qty, w.order_status, i.name, i.unit FROM work_order w JOIN production_plan p ON w.plan_num = p.plan_num JOIN item i ON p.item_num = i.item_num WHERE ROWNUM <= 5 ORDER BY w.created_at desc
